parameters.formDescription: Select a textbook chapter to generate a homework session

parameters.query: SELECT task_id::text AS task_id, subject, grade, lang, lesson_id, pdf_uri AS chapter_uri FROM nets_task_queue WHERE status='pending' ORDER BY subject, grade, lang, lesson_id LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO nets_task_queue (task_id, subject, grade, lang, lesson_id, pdf_uri, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.task_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.subject }}', {{ $json.grade }}, '{{ $json.lang }}', '{{ $json.lesson_id }}', '{{ $json.chapter_uri }}', 'extracting', now(), now()) ON CONFLICT (task_id) DO UPDATE SET status='extracting', updated_at=now()

INSERT INTO nets_lessons (lesson_id, subject, grade, lang, pdf_uri, md_uri, extracted_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.lesson_id }}', '{{ $json.subject }}', {{ $json.grade }}, '{{ $json.lang }}', '{{ $json.chapter_uri }}', '{{ $json.lesson_path }}', now()) ON CONFLICT (lesson_id) DO UPDATE SET md_uri=EXCLUDED.md_uri, extracted_at=now()
SELECT phase_id FROM nets_phase_outputs WHERE lesson_id='{{ $('Set Task').first().json.lesson_id }}'

INSERT INTO nets_phase_outputs (task_id, lesson_id, phase_id, output_json, schema_valid, tokens_in, tokens_out, cost_usd, latency_ms) VALUES ('{{ $json.task_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.lesson_id }}', '{{ $json.phase_id }}', '{{ $json.phase_output_json }}'::jsonb, true, {{ $json.tokens_in }}, {{ $json.tokens_out }}, {{ $json.cost_usd }}, {{ $json.latency_ms }}) ON CONFLICT (lesson_id, phase_id) DO UPDATE SET output_json=EXCLUDED.output_json, tokens_in=EXCLUDED.tokens_in, tokens_out=EXCLUDED.tokens_out, cost_usd=EXCLUDED.cost_usd

SELECT po.task_id::text AS task_id, po.lesson_id, po.phase_id, po.output_json FROM nets_phase_outputs po WHERE po.lesson_id='{{ $('Set Task').first().json.lesson_id }}' ORDER BY CASE po.phase_id WHEN 'phase_0a' THEN 1 WHEN 'phase_0b' THEN 2 WHEN 'phase_1' THEN 3 WHEN 'phase_2' THEN 4 WHEN 'phase_3' THEN 5 WHEN 'phase_4' THEN 6 WHEN 'phase_5' THEN 7 WHEN 'phase_6' THEN 8 WHEN 'phase_7' THEN 9 END
UPDATE nets_task_queue SET status='done', updated_at=now() WHERE lesson_id='{{ $json.lesson_id }}'
INSERT INTO nets_session_log (task_id, stage, event, payload) VALUES ('{{ $('Set Task').first().json.task_id }}'::uuid, 'assemble', 'success', '{"md_path": "{{ $json.md_path }}"}'::jsonb)
